title: この星明かりをしるべにして

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Oh, they've put out the list of entrants for the
Japan Cup.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Myself... Opera O, Doto, and...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Good morning! Huh? Where's Top Road?

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
Oh... She's not here yet? Then I think she might
be off today. I heard some teachers talking about
it.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Really?! That's not like her! Is she sick? I hope
she's okay.

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
Um, well, I think they said she wasn't feeling well,
but look...

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text: Didn't you hear about the Japan Cup?

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text: Top Road didn't get a spot in the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the afternoon. Whenever Admire Vega has
training, she's usually the first to arrive on the
field, ready to go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's how efficient she is... usually.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That on its own is enough of a sign that
something is wrong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks at me indecisively, frantically searching
for the right words to say.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now I'm certain she's holding something back.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list: You know yourself pretty well now, right?
You know yourself pretty well now, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seasons have come and gone since she confided
in me during our New Year's shrine visit. Now that
she's been living her life honestly and for herself...
choice_data_list: I want to know what you want to do.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'd like to take a break from training today.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I... want to talk to Top Road about something.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ah.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...There you are.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe?! Wh-what are you doing here?! Shouldn't
you be at training?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
What about you? You should be resting in your
dorm if you aren't feeling well.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ah... hahaha.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I thought skipping class and taking the day off
would clear my head, but it's not doing any good.
Probably 'cause I've never done this before!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't think of anything I wanted to do or
anywhere I wanted to go. Before I knew it, half
the day was already gone.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: In that case...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Why don't we skip class the right way?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Cosmetics?! Ayabe, I had no idea you like this
stuff!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well... not particularly.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Right, you even cut your hair yourself! So... why
are we here again?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: This one's a miss, I guess. Okay...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Um... It looks like this restaurant has some special
rules. Do you know them, Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Not really. But...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I know there are a few items that would be really
embarrassing to order.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Wh-what a minefield!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! You don't like noisy places! We should
get going!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe and Top Road
text_block_list.text: Siiigh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I guess I'm not one to talk, but you aren't
great at skipping class either!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Still...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Thank you for looking out for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: And you know, I think I'm all right now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
It's true that I won't be able to race in this year's
Japan Cup, but it's not the end!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: So, um... I'm going to head back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I want to go for a run, so—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Wait.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Stay with me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Until it's night—stay until the stars come out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The two wait in silence until the sun goes down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They continue to wait and wait until...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe? What are those four shining stars over
there?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That's the Great Square. It's also called the Great
Square of Pegasus.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I see... Pegasus, huh? That sounds so cool. I bet
they could take off flying and never look back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
...I wanted to shine brightly like that with
everyone else.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: It's... hard, though.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I can't be like Opera O or Doto, and I could never
be like you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter what I do, I'll only ever be
myself... And it looks like this is as far as I can
get.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...You're right.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You can't be anyone else. You'll only ever be
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's why I want to race against you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Wha...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You're reliable and caring. Your running is a little
sloppy, but you're strong and super popular.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You're earnest in your promises to meet your fans'
expectations, but you tend to overthink things a
bit... You're a good person.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Top Road...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Let's compete again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: You can gather your strength, then you can get back to training...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: That way, when we compete again—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Oh... Top Road's hand.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(I brushed her off once before. But now, one year
later, I feel her touch.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (...This is the hand of my strongest rival.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Be sure to come watch me at the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Watch me, and I know you'll want to face me
again.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Because I'm going to win. So...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
So you want me to be there, to crawl out of my
slump and see you, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Even if I'm coughing up blood?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Uuuh...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I guess so?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: ...Heh. Ahahaha! Ahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I've never heard you say something so selfish!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You're right...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That might be the first time I've said something
like that.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Is... that okay?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I-is that okay? Well... I think I already feel at least a tad bett—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Heeey!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You two are bad little ponies! What in the world
has gotten into you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Did you have fun skipping class and breaking
curfew? I hope so, because I'm assigning you
extra cleaning duties as punishment!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe and Top Road
text_block_list.text: ...Understood.
